reference: Hi, I had a miscarriage almost three months ago. I had a hemorrhage; that is the reason I lost my baby. Well, my husband and I had sexual intercourse yesterday during my fertile days. Usually, we wear a condom, but this time we did not. He ejaculated on my vulva, close to my vagina. Can I still get pregnant?
text: Hi, I had a miscarriage almost three months ago. I had a hemorrhage, that is the reason I lost my baby. Well, my husband and I had sexual intercourse yesterday during my fertile days. Usually we wear a condom but this time we did not. He ejaculated on my vulva, close to my vagina. Can I still get pregnant?
